name: Crockpot Ham and Potatoes
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
2 (10 3/4 ounce) cans cream of mushroom or celery soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Put half of the ham, potatoes, and onions in the crockpot.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper, then grated cheese.
3. Repeat with the remaining half of the ingredients.
4. Spoon undiluted soup over top.
5. Sprinkle with paprika.
6. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours or on high for 4 hours.
